description_long: This object is a modern Samsung smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a centered punch-hole camera at the top. The back is finished in a matte light blue color and displays the Samsung logo near the bottom, with a triple camera array housed in a raised, dark-colored module at the top left. The sides are slim and dark, with visible physical buttons on the right edge. The device appears to be constructed from a combination of glass, metal, and plastic, giving it a premium yet durable appearance. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek Samsung smartphone with a large display, triple rear cameras, and a matte blue back. The design is modern and minimalist, with visible side buttons and a centered front camera.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display with a centered punch-hole camera and minimal bezels.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the slim profile and visible physical buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte blue finish, Samsung logo, and triple camera array in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the slim edge with no visible buttons or features.
attribute_brand_logo: The Samsung logo is centered horizontally near the bottom of the back panel, rendered in black text.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a pastel abstract wallpaper with shades of purple, blue, and white, and no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back, housed in a raised, dark-colored module.
attribute_button_layout: There are physical buttons on the right edge, likely including a power button and volume rocker, with a slim and elongated shape.
